hits.title: How do I reset my password?
hits.summary: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login screen. A reset link will be sent to the registered email address. The link expires after 15 minutes. If the customer does not receive the email, advise them to check their spam folder and confirm the email address used at registration.

hits.title: Can I exchange a product?
hits.summary: We do not offer direct exchanges. Customers must return the original item for a refund and place a new, separate order for the desired item. If the customer is worried about stock availability, create a note on the ticket and our team will prioritize their new order.

hits.title: I was charged twice for the same order. What should I do?
hits.summary: A duplicate charge is usually a temporary authorization hold, not a true double charge. The secondary hold is typically released within 3-5 business days. If both charges appear as 'Posted' (not pending) on the customer's bank statement, create a billing dispute ticket and escalate to Tier 2 immediately.
